'''âh-m-b''' ('''kahamab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaporate|vaporate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaporate|vaporate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-m-b
|-
! Lemma
| kahamab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihamab|thihamab]] || [[word:jihamab|jihamab]] || [[word:shihamab|shihamab]] || [[word:kihamab|kihamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhamab|thuthuhamab]] || [[word:jujuhamab|jujuhamab]] || [[word:shushuhamab|shushuhamab]] || [[word:kukuhamab|kukuhamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhamab|thuhamab]] || [[word:juhamab|juhamab]] || [[word:shuhamab|shuhamab]] || [[word:kuhamab|kuhamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhamab|thuhamab]] || [[word:juhamab|juhamab]] || [[word:shuhamab|shuhamab]] || [[word:kuhamab|kuhamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehamab|thehamab]] || [[word:jehamab|jehamab]] || [[word:shehamab|shehamab]] || [[word:kehamab|kehamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohamab|thothohamab]] || [[word:jojohamab|jojohamab]] || [[word:shoshohamab|shoshohamab]] || [[word:kokohamab|kokohamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohamab|thohamab]] || [[word:johamab|johamab]] || [[word:shohamab|shohamab]] || [[word:kohamab|kohamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohamab|thohamab]] || [[word:johamab|johamab]] || [[word:shohamab|shohamab]] || [[word:kohamab|kohamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚhamab|thĂŚhamab]] || [[word:jĂŚhamab|jĂŚhamab]] || [[word:shĂŚhamab|shĂŚhamab]] || [[word:kĂŚhamab|kĂŚhamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahamab|thathahamab]] || [[word:jajahamab|jajahamab]] || [[word:shashahamab|shashahamab]] || [[word:kakahamab|kakahamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahamab|thahamab]] || [[word:jahamab|jahamab]] || [[word:shahamab|shahamab]] || [[word:kahamab|kahamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahamab|thahamab]] || [[word:jahamab|jahamab]] || [[word:shahamab|shahamab]] || [[word:kahamab|kahamab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahamab|shahamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahamab|goshahamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahamab|gokishahamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahamabnĂź|shahamabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahamabnknĂź|goshahamabnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamabnĂź|gokishahamabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahamabshĂŤ|shahamabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahamabnkshĂŤ|goshahamabnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahamabshĂŤ|gokishahamabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamabro|shahamabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamabnkro|goshahamabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamabro|gokishahamabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamabmu|shahamabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamabnkmu|goshahamabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamabmu|gokishahamabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahamabsher|shahamabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahamabnksher|goshahamabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahamabsher|gokishahamabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahamabng|shahamabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahamabnkng|goshahamabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahamabng|gokishahamabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahamabya|shahamabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahamabnkya|goshahamabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahamabya|gokishahamabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahamabyam|shahamabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahamabnkyam|goshahamabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahamabyam|gokishahamabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamabnĂźshĂŤ|shahamabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamabnknĂźshĂŤ|goshahamabnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamabnĂźshĂŤ|gokishahamabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamabnĂźro|shahamabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamabnknĂźro|goshahamabnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamabnĂźro|gokishahamabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamabnĂźmu|shahamabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamabnknĂźmu|goshahamabnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamabnĂźmu|gokishahamabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamabshĂŤnĂź|shahamabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamabnkshĂŤnĂź|goshahamabnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamabshĂŤnĂź|gokishahamabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamabshĂŤro|shahamabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamabnkshĂŤro|goshahamabnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamabshĂŤro|gokishahamabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamabshĂŤmu|shahamabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamabnkshĂŤmu|goshahamabnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamabshĂŤmu|gokishahamabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamabronĂź|shahamabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamabnkronĂź|goshahamabnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamabronĂź|gokishahamabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamabroshĂŤ|shahamabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamabnkroshĂŤ|goshahamabnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamabroshĂŤ|gokishahamabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamabromu|shahamabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamabnkromu|goshahamabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamabromu|gokishahamabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamabmunĂź|shahamabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamabnkmunĂź|goshahamabnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamabmunĂź|gokishahamabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamabmushĂŤ|shahamabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamabnkmushĂŤ|goshahamabnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamabmushĂŤ|gokishahamabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamabmuro|shahamabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamabnkmuro|goshahamabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamabmuro|gokishahamabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
